name: Vanilla Brandy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the brandy into a 1 pint glass jar.
2. Add the vanilla bean to the jar.
3. Seal the jar tightly and store it in a cool, dark, dry place for at least one week.
--To Serve
Stir the brandy to taste into yogurt and serve with fresh fruit or use in other vanilla recipes as desired. Enjoy.
